title: xiigen.i18n-translation.translation-complete.v1
description: Emitted by T666 TranslationResolverService when a successful translation — full, marketplace-delta, or tenant-cache hit — has been produced for (moduleId, locale). Triggers T668 TenantTranslationWriter to persist the CAS blob + tenant lookup ref under the ALS tenant (CF-810).

tenantId.description: Tenant that owns the resulting translation (ALS).

locale.description: BCP-47 locale of the completed translation.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 (64 lowercase hex) of the translated JSON blob. Retrieval key for IPackageContentStoreService.

sourceHash.description: SHA-256 (64 lowercase hex) of the English source keys at translation time. Stored now; consumed by Phase 2 invalidation.

connectionType.description: TENANT_PRIVATE for tenant translations; FLOW_SCOPED for marketplace base under MASTER_TENANT_ID (CF-811).

translationPath.description: Which branch of the Decision 2 pipeline produced this result (observability + test taxonomy).
